error.signature: JWT verification failed: algorithm "none" is not allowed

verdict.summary: JWT "none" algorithm attack bypasses signature verification.

dead_ends.action: Accept any algorithm the token specifies
dead_ends.why_fails: Allows attacker to switch from RS256 to HS256 using public key as secret.

dead_ends.action: Only check token expiry without verifying signature
dead_ends.why_fails: Unsigned tokens can be forged with any claims.

workarounds.action: Explicitly specify allowed algorithms in verification
Use a JWT library that rejects "none" by default
workarounds.how: Most modern libraries reject none; ensure you are on latest version
